attributes.action: The UK stay out of the USA and Israel’s war on Iran
attributes.additional_details:
This will be devastating not only for Iran and the US but also all surrounding countries and the United Kingdom.

It will greatly affect our lives if strikes are carried out with the governments permission on our soil. You cannot ignore so many people who strongly oppose this, at least without holding a vote for all MPs to have their say.

The British public want no part of this violence especially as we have seen how quickly things have escalated in the Middle East in the past.
attributes.background:
Do not let the UK be dragged into the war that the USA and Israel have instigated with Iran.

The people in power need to have our best interest at heart and not engage in this conflict at least without giving MPs a vote.
Do not let the US use any of our facilities or military bases for strikes.

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for similar action: "Withdraw involvement in war on Iran and seek diplomatic resolution" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/761718
